TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Sinkam ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 126 buwan, 431 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 379 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 52 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 80%, Amis 4%, Puyuma 0.5%, saySiyat 0.5%, Truku 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sinkam hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sinkam hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sinkam hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sinkam hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sinkam hya' ga Nakahila. tay 'zil na Sinkam hya' ga Panital. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Sinkam ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Sinkam maku 1 hasisyo. khu skwan biru qalang Sinkam maki 1 skwan biru. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕinkam ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pujuma *.*%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *.*%, truku *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕinkam ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕinkam ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕinkam ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕinkam ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕinkam ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħila. taj ʔzil na s~ɕinkam ħjaʔ ɣa panital. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ s~ɕinkam ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo qalaŋ s~ɕinkam maku * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru qalaŋ s~ɕinkam maki * s~ɕkwan βiru. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Sinkam ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Zosi go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 126 buwan, 431 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 379 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 52 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 80%, Amis 4%, Puyuma 0.5%, saySiyat 0.5%, Truku 0.5%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sinkam hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Sinkam hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sinkam hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sinkam hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sinkam hya' ga Nakahila. tay 'zil na Sinkam hya' ga Panital. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Sinkam ga ungat kyokay. hasisyo qalang Sinkam maku 1 hasisyo. khu skwan biru qalang Sinkam maki 1 skwan biru. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕinkam ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu zos~ɕi ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, amis~ɕ *%, pujuma *.*%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *.*%, truku *.*%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕinkam ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕinkam ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕinkam ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕinkam ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕinkam ħjaʔ ɣa nakaħila. taj ʔzil na s~ɕinkam ħjaʔ ɣa panital. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ s~ɕinkam ɣa uŋat kjokaj. ħas~ɕis~ɕjo qalaŋ s~ɕinkam maku * ħas~ɕis~ɕjo. kħu s~ɕkwan βiru qalaŋ s~ɕinkam maki * s~ɕkwan βiru. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
